arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal and Tottenham now approached as potential buyers for 2024 Ballon d'Or contender
Report: Andrea Berta expected to push for 'intelligent' striker compared to Haaland once Arsenal arrival is sealed
Arsenal transfer news: Gunners 'yet to begin contract talks' with key midfielder
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly yet to open contract negotiations with a midfielder whose contract is due to expire at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: William Saliba would only be Arsenal's third-highest earner with 'new contract offer'
arts.sum: William Saliba has been a crucial part of Arsenal's recent progression in the Premier League as part of a successful centre-back partnership with Brazilian defender Gabriel

arts.ttl: Arsenal 2025/26 latest kit leaks as stunning throwback hints at Nike repeat
arts.sum: According to reports, the Gunners' 2025/26 third kit throws it back to the Nike 2007 alternate strip with a mainly white torso and a burgundy trim around the neck and colour. According to the latest leaks, Arsenal fans will be treated to a stunning new kit.

arts.ttl: Ian Subiabre to Arsenal transfer latest as 'next Julian Alvarez' price tag set
arts.sum: So, with that being said, football.london has rounded up everything you need to know about Subiabre and a potential transfer to the Emirates Stadium. Ian Subiabre has recently emerged as a potential target for Arsenal ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Josh Kroenke flies in as Arsenal plot transfer plan amid Alexander Isak and Benjamin Sesko links
arts.sum: Football.london reported on Monday that former Atletico Madrid chief Andrea Berta is one of the candidates being considered for the sporting director role at the Emirates Stadium. Arsenal owners Kroenke Sports & Entertainment came underfire during the winter transfer window after the failure to sign attacking reinforcements following their injury issues in forward areas amid links with Alexander Isak and Benjamin Sesko.

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal chief demands 'uncomfortable' rule change as new Man City charges verdict given
arts.sum: Former Arsenal director and vice-chairman David Dein wants to see current Premier League financial rules scrapped amid Manchester City's ongoing legal battle. Dein, who was vice-chairman of Arsenal between 1983 and 2007, was instrumental in setting up the Premier League in 1992, but acknowledges the current financial rules are outdated.

arts.ttl: Fabio Vieira has just sent Mikel Arteta transfer reminder ahead of Arsenal summer squad refresh
arts.sum: Fabio Vieira was one of them and he enjoyed a rather good week for Porto back in his native Portugal, but players such as Reiss Nelson and Albert Sambi Lokonga could only watch on with injury keeping them on the sidelines. Even those Arsenal players currently playing their football away from the club had a very quiet weekend with only a couple of loan stars in action.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer to be completed 'THIS WEEK' as 'everything agreed'
arts.sum: Jorginho's pre-contract signing with Flamengo could be formally completed this week, according to Brazilian media. Brazilian giants Flamengo have been courting him since the winter, but there has been plenty of uncertainty surrounding a potential deal.
